channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya Struggles to Industrialise Due to Infrastructure and Skills Challenges
item.description: Nairobi — Kenya's efforts to grow its industrial sector are facing serious challenges, mainly due to inadequate infrastructure and a shortage of skilled workers, according to the 2025 RED Index of Ind...

item.title: Inaugural Sa Ladakh Art Biennale to Showcase Climate-Aware and Regenerative Art Practices
item.description: The first edition of the Sa Ladakh Art Biennale is set to take place from August 1 to 10, 2026, along the 230-kilometre Leh-Kargil corridor, at an altitude exceeding 3,000 metres, making it one of the...

item.title: Cameron Smith backs Max Plath as a potential bolter for Queensland Maroons in State of Origin
item.description: Cameron Smith, one of the greatest players in rugby league history, has thrown his support behind Max Plath as a potential surprise selection for the Queensland Maroons in the upcoming State of Origin...

item.title: African nations advise citizens to stay safe amid violence against migrants in South Africa
item.description: Several African countries, including Kenya, Malawi, Lesotho, Zimbabwe and Ghana, have issued warnings to their citizens living in South Africa because of rising xenophobic attacks. Migrants have been ...

item.title: Rising Demand for Cottage Cheese Causes Supply Shortages in Canada
item.description: Canadian consumers are noticing a surge in cottage cheese prices and occasional shortages in stores across the country. Once considered a niche or 'diet' food, cottage cheese has regained popularity d...

item.title: Deadly attacks in South Waziristan claim lives of three children and injure several
item.description: On Thursday, South Waziristan witnessed two separate attacks that tragically killed three children and injured several others, according to security sources. The first attack involved an explosion nea...

item.title: Genetic matches identify four Franklin expedition sailors through descendant DNA
item.description: Researchers have identified the remains of four sailors from Sir John Franklin’s ill-fated 1845 Arctic expedition by matching DNA from skeletal remains with living descendants. The breakthrough comes ...

item.title: Akwa Ibom State Begins International Flights From Victor Attah Airport
item.description: Akwa Ibom don enter international aviation scene as dem launch dia first ever international flight from Victor Attah International Airport. The inaugural flight, wey Ibom Air dey operate, dey go Accra...

item.title: Pakistan Armed Forces Highlight Preparedness and Indigenous Capabilities on Marka-i-Haq Anniversary
item.description: On the first anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, DG ISPR Lt Gen Ahmed Sharif Chaudhry, along with senior naval and air officials, addressed the media in Islamabad, underlining Pakistan's readiness and homegro...

item.title: Oil Prices Volatile Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions and Strait of Hormuz Concerns
item.description: Oil prices experienced volatile trading as investors monitored escalating tensions between the United States and Iran. Brent crude futures for July decreased by 1.85% to $99.40 per barrel, while U.S. ...

item.title: Drone Strikes Target Russian Nuclear Facility and Baltic Port Amid Escalating Conflict
item.description: On May 3, 2026, Ukrainian forces carried out drone attacks on two key Russian-held sites: the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant in southeastern Ukraine and the Baltic Sea port of Primorsk. The Internat...

item.title: Sandiganbayan criticizes OSG for delays in presenting evidence on Marcos family's forfeited assets
item.description: Sandiganbayan justices have expressed frustration with government lawyers from the Office of the Solicitor General (OSG) for not presenting additional evidence in the long-running forfeiture case agai...

item.title: Western Australia posts eighth straight surplus with mining revenue funding household payments
item.description: Western Australia has recorded its eighth consecutive budget surplus, underpinned by strong mining revenues and GST income totalling more than $18 billion. Treasurer Rita Saffioti announced a $3.5 bil...

item.title: Zanzibar to host Union Cup gala honouring teams and stakeholders after 2026 tournament
item.description: The Zanzibar Football Federation (ZFF) is set to organise a special Union Cup gala night on May 13 at the New Amaan Complex in Zanzibar, aiming to celebrate the successful completion of the 2026 Union...

item.title: EU agrees on law to prohibit sexualized AI-generated deepfakes
item.description: The European Union has reached a significant agreement to ban sexualized deepfake content generated using artificial intelligence. This move comes amid rising concerns over privacy violations, harassm...

item.title: Israeli Forces Intercept Gaza-Bound Flotilla on High Seas, Detain Activists and Seize Vessels
item.description: On April 29, 2026, Israeli military forces intercepted vessels from the Global Samud Flotilla while they were sailing in international waters. According to reports, Israeli commandos boarded 21 boats,...

item.title: Arsenal and PSG face contrasting styles in highly anticipated Champions League final
item.description: The upcoming Champions League final between Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain represents more than just a contest for European glory; it is a meeting of two contrasting philosophies in football. Arsenal...

item.title: Stephen Crichton expresses concern over Bulldogs' ongoing struggles
item.description: Stephen Crichton, a key player for the Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs, has publicly voiced his concerns following the team's latest defeat. After yet another loss, Crichton stressed the need for clarit...

item.title: The Need for Bold, Creative Action to Fix Nigeria
item.description: This article dey reason our national wahala as Nigerians dey shout 'Karamba!' every time life hit us with problem, but our response na usually japa or give up. The writer, Huzaifa Jega, talk say the r...

item.title: Dar Youth League Returns with Bulls FA and Simba SC Youth Highlighting Weekend Fixtures
item.description: Di 2026 Dar Youth League is coming back dis weekend at di Dar es Salaam Gymkhana Ground with four lively matches planned. Di main attraction for Sunday, May 10, is di clash between Bulls Football Acad...
